scripts.dev: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless run astro dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.preview: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 PORTLESS_PORT=443 PORTLESS_HTTPS=1 portless run astro preview
scripts.check-types: bun run --filter leadtype build && bun run docs:generate && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check
